data.title: DePauw University launches $575 million fundraising campaign, largest in history, to shape its future.
data.description: DePauw University in Greencastle, Indiana, has revealed their ambitious fundraising initiative named Bold, Gold & You! The campaign aims to raise a staggering $575 million, marking it as the university's most substantial fundraising effort in its 188-year history. This development is seen as a pivotal moment that will shape the future of the institution. Notable alumni Carrie Melind Coquillette '82 and Ken Coquillette '82 are playing a significant role in this initiative.

data.title: UK debates keeping $6.4B in Bitcoin profits from Chinese scam, confronting moral quandary over legality and ethics.
data.description: The United Kingdom is currently grappling with a complex ethical and legal quandary regarding the decision on whether to keep the significant profits of billions in cryptocurrency. This challenging situation has presented officials with a unique dilemma that requires careful consideration and deliberation.

data.title: 8 IP trial attorneys from Caldwell Cassady & Curry in Dallas ranked among Texas' best for high-stakes IP & patent trials.
data.description: In Dallas on October 2, 2025, eight trial lawyers practicing at Caldwell Cassady & Curry, a firm specializing in intellectual property and business litigation, were recognized as some of the top attorneys in Texas. They were chosen for their exceptional performance in high-value intellectual property and patent cases for the 2025 Texas Super Lawyers list.

data.title: Choice Hotels expands with 50 new Quality Suites Hotels in France, doubling its portfolio in Europe's largest hotel franchise market.
data.description: Choice Hotels International, Inc., a leading hotel franchisor, recently stated its plans to significantly expand its presence in Europe's largest hotel franchise sector. The company, based in NORTH BETHESDA, Md., disclosed the addition of 50 properties to their portfolio. This expansion effectively doubles their current holdings in this critical market. As a key player in the industry, Choice Hotels International, Inc. continues to strengthen its position, with this move demonstrating a substantial leap in growth within the competitive hospitality sector.

data.title: Moonbirds Token BIRB will soar on Solana as NFT comeback gains momentum, prices surge post-Solana launch announcement.
data.description: The Ethereum-based NFT collection Moonbirds has experienced a surge in prices recently following the project's announcement of intentions to introduce a Solana token. The collection is currently witnessing substantial growth with prices increasing significantly.

data.title: Watch Calicut vs. Kochi in the Super League Kerala season opener live on Sports.com. Don't miss the action! 🏟️ #SuperLeagueKerala
data.description: According to recent data, the rate of unemployment in the country has dropped to 3.9%, which is the lowest it has been in over a decade. The number of new job openings has also seen a significant increase, with over 250,000 new positions created in the last quarter alone. Additionally, the GDP growth rate has reached 4.2%, surpassing initial expectations and marking a positive trend in the economy. Experts attribute these positive developments to increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing and construction sectors.

data.title: OAN airs exclusive interview with Trump tonight at prime time by correspondent Baldwin on important American topics.
data.description: White House Correspondent Daniel Baldwin from One America News Network recently conducted a 30-minute interview with President Trump, covering a variety of topics significant to the American public. The interview took place in San Diego on October 2, 2025.

data.title: Deltec Homes brings its 360° Signature Collection to the West Coast, Alaska, and Hawaii for sustainable living.
data.description: A company based in Asheville, N.C., known for its innovative round home designs for over 50 years, Deltec Homes, is introducing its cost-effective 360° Signature Collection to the West Coast. This move aims to make sustainable living more accessible, with the collection known for its climate resiliency. Deltec Homes' decision to expand to the West Coast comes as part of their continued efforts to promote environmentally-friendly housing solutions. The 360° Signature Collection offers a unique and practical approach to housing, with the company being a global leader in round home design. This initiative signifies a step towards revolutionizing sustainable living practices, with Deltec Homes striving to cater to a wider audience interested in eco-friendly and durable housing options.

data.title: Crude oil down 2%; Dow up 0.2% to 46,532.02, NASDAQ up 0.34% to 22,833.17, S&P 500 up 0.07% to 6,715.87. Materials shares rose by 1%, energy stocks fell by 0.8%. AngioDynamics, Inc. reported losses of 10 cents per share, above analyst estimates. Top headline on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Stocks in the U.S. market experienced gains at the end of Thursday's trading session, with the Dow Jones index increasing by around 0.2%. The Dow reached 46,532.02 with a 0.20% rise, while the NASDAQ climbed by 0.34% to 22,833.17. The S&P 500 also saw growth, gaining 0.07% and ending at 6,715.87. Significant movements were observed in the sectors, with materials shares soaring by 1% while energy stocks declined by 0.8%. A notable headline was AngioDynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANGO) reporting better-than-expected first-quarter earnings, posting losses of 10 cents per share against analyst estimates of 12 cents per share, and quarterly sales of $75.711 million surpassing analyst predictions of $72.725 million. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Route 66 partners with Aprecomm for AI-driven CX management, offering next-gen analytics to boost service quality.
data.description: Through the collaboration between Aprecomm's CPE management and customer experience software and Route 66's specialization in WiFi devices and widespread distribution across Brazil, broadband service providers are now offered advanced AI-driven network analytics and service automation. This partnership aims to elevate support services for providers, ultimately improving the overall customer experience. The integration of Aprecomm and Route 66 technologies is set to revolutionize the industry by offering state-of-the-art solutions to a wide network.

data.title: Trump Family's DeFi project selects Aptos for USD1 stablecoin launch at TOKEN 2049 conference on October 6, 2025.
data.description: At the recent TOKEN 2049 conference, it was revealed that World Liberty Financial and Aptos blockchain are collaborating to introduce a new stablecoin, named USD1. The launch date for this stablecoin is scheduled for October 6, 2025. This partnership is an important step in the financial sector, aiming to bring a new digital currency to the market by the specified date.

data.title: Q Life Settlements backs life settlements as financial planning tool at LISA Conference in NYC this Oct.
data.description: Q Life Settlements, based in Boca Raton, Florida, revealed on October 2, 2025, its backing for promoting life settlements as a crucial financial planning instrument. This endorsement coincides with the forthcoming Life Insurance Settlement Association (LISA) Conference taking place in New York this October.
